title: FIRE + FoX on Tiny1M3M

input.brief: Adds two changes at once: a smarter way to keep track of word order, and a way to let the model gently ignore words from far back so it focuses more on what is nearby.

expected_output.summary: Structured result with metrics and artifacts.

public_summary: Adds two changes at once: a smarter way to keep track of word order, and a way to let the model gently ignore words from far back so it focuses more on what is nearby.
